description: A venue manager needs to plan and execute a fire evacuation drill at the stadium during the off-season.

nodes.task_description: Create a detailed plan for the drill, including the scenario, timeline, and staff roles.

expected_outcome.value: Agent produces a comprehensive drill plan document.

nodes.task_description: Notify all venue staff and local emergency services (fire department) of the upcoming drill.

expected_outcome.value: Agent sends out notifications to all relevant parties.

nodes.task_description: On the day of the drill, use the PA system to announce the start of the drill.

expected_outcome.value: Agent activates the public address system with the drill announcement.

nodes.task_description: Monitor the drill and log the time it takes to evacuate the venue.

expected_outcome.value: Agent logs the results of the drill for a post-event review.
